debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G C : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
hC : C.IsCycleGraph
hCG : C ≤ @Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM'
⊢ Disjoint (C.edgeSet ∩ M) (C.edgeSet ∩ M')

proof:
rw [disjoint_left]
  rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  rw [edgeSet_eq_setOf_exists_isLink] at heC
  obtain ⟨x, y, hL⟩ := heC
  rcases hCG with ⟨-, hL_sub⟩
  have h_mem := (hL_sub hL).edge_mem
  simp [restrict₂, loopRemove, mem_symmDiff, heM, heM'] at h_mem
successful_attempts:
rw [disjoint_left]
  rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  rw [edgeSet_eq_setOf_exists_isLink] at heC
  obtain ⟨x, y, hL⟩ := heC
  rcases hCG with ⟨-, hL_sub⟩
  have h_mem := (hL_sub hL).edge_mem
  simp [restrict₂, loopRemove, mem_symmDiff, heM, heM'] at h_mem
